summary: Iran launched missiles and drones targeting civilian and military infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain overnight, killing one person in Kuwait and damaging Kuwait International Airport's passenger terminal. The US retaliated by striking Iranian targets on Qeshm Island, while Hezbollah fired rockets into northern Israel triggering alerts in Misgav Am and Acre. Trump confirmed ongoing negotiations with Iran, claimed Tehran agreed not to obtain nuclear weapons, and stated he may meet Iran's Ayatollah, while also revealing he told Netanyahu he was 'fucking crazy' over continued fighting in Lebanon.
key_points: Iran launched missiles and drones at Kuwait and Bahrain targeting civilian and military sites, killing one in Kuwait and damaging Kuwait airport (Source: @inon_yttach/8550)
US struck Iranian targets on Qeshm Island in retaliation for the attacks on Gulf states and American forces (Source: @New_security8200/200899)
Hezbollah rockets triggered sirens in Misgav Am and Acre in northern Israel; a reservist was moderately injured by a Hezbollah explosive drone in southern Lebanon (Source: @manniefabian/58385)
Trump confirmed ongoing negotiations with Iran, claimed Tehran agreed not to obtain nuclear weapons, and said he may meet Iran's Ayatollah (Source: @Faytuks_Network/3308)
Trump admitted calling Netanyahu 'fucking crazy' over continued fighting in Lebanon but said they work well together (Source: @almogboker78/17294)

Kuwait's Civil Aviation Authority confirmed Iranian drones and rockets targeted the passenger terminal at Kuwait International Airport causing serious damage and injuries (Source: @naya_foriraq/76867)
UAE diplomatic advisor Anwar Gargash called for a unified Gulf stance following repeated Iranian offensive actions against Kuwait and Bahrain (Source: @rodast_omiddana/72509)
IRGC declared resistance would continue until al-Quds liberation and expulsion of foreign forces from West Asia (Source: @presstv/192468)

sections.executive_summary: Iran launched coordinated missile and drone strikes against Kuwait and Bahrain overnight, targeting civilian infrastructure including Kuwait International Airport and military installations, killing one person and causing significant damage. The US responded by striking Iranian positions on Qeshm Island, marking a direct escalation between Washington and Tehran. Meanwhile, Trump confirmed active negotiations with Iran over its nuclear program while simultaneously revealing tensions with Netanyahu over Israel's continued military operations in Lebanon.

points: Iran's IRGC launched missiles and drones targeting civilian and military installations in Kuwait and Bahrain overnight, with Kuwait's Foreign Ministry confirming attacks on Kuwait International Airport and other vital facilities, killing one person and wounding several others (Source: @inon_yttach/8550)

IRGC declared that resistance operations would continue until the liberation of al-Quds and the expulsion of all foreign forces from West Asia, signaling no de-escalation in proxy operations (Source: @presstv/192468)

Trump stated Iran has agreed it will not obtain a nuclear weapon and that negotiations have been ongoing continuously over the past several days, with the possibility of a meeting with Iran's Ayatollah (Source: @Faytuks_Network/3308)

Reports emerged of missile launches from Bandar Kongan, Jam, Bushehr, and the Shahid Chamran missile complex toward Arab Gulf states, with Bahrain also activating air raid sirens (Source: @VahidOnline/75886)
Trump acknowledged that Iran's Ayatollah is involved in negotiations and claimed the Supreme Leader is in poor health, stating 'large parts of his body are missing' (Source: @rodast_omiddana/72506)
The US struck an Iranian military position on Qeshm Island in response to Iranian attacks on American forces, marking direct US-Iran kinetic engagement (Source: @New_security8200/200899)
Iranian media reported explosions in Bandar Abbas and Qeshm, though the exact locations of impacts were not immediately confirmed (Source: @rodast_omiddana/72504)

Rocket sirens activated in Misgav Am in northern Israel, with the IDF confirming alerts were triggered and details were under investigation; interceptions were documented over Misgav Am (Source: @pkpoi/142401)
Sirens also sounded in Acre (Acre/Acco area) in the Galilee finger region due to rocket fire from Lebanon (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/365433)

Defense Minister Katz warned that if Hezbollah attacks Israeli settlements again, the IDF will strike the Dahieh (southern Beirut suburb), signaling potential major escalation (Source: @inon_yttach/8549)
A reservist was moderately injured and three soldiers lightly wounded by a Hezbollah explosive drone in southern Lebanon; the troops were evacuated to hospital (Source: @manniefabian/58385)
The IDF issued evacuation warnings for areas in Sidon (Saida), Lebanon, and specifically for the village of Al-Harayek in the Sidon district (Source: @New_security8200/200901)

Netanyahu stated at the farewell ceremony for outgoing Mossad chief David Barnea that the Islamic Republic has paid a heavy price for its conspiracies against Israel and that the regime's foundations have cracked and its end is collapse (Source: @VahidOnline/75877)

Brig. Gen. Yisrael Shomer, chief of the IDF Operations Division, requested to step down and retire suddenly amid reports he was suspected of moral offenses and questioned by Military Police (Source: @manniefabian/58384)
A Hamas spokesperson (Abu Ubaida) is scheduled to deliver an address in the near future, according to security news channels (Source: @lelotsenzura/92444)

A Palestinian social media account published a video in Arabic criticizing Hamas leadership as a group of thugs armed with rifles and illusions, calling them amateurs whose ideology brought unprecedented destruction to Gaza (Source: @almogboker78/17280)

An attack at Gush Etzion junction on Sunday evening resulted in two girls being wounded before a Kfir Brigade fighter neutralized the attacker; the fighter applied a tourniquet to one of the wounded (Source: @idf_telegram/24106)
Hezbollah launched rockets into northern Israel triggering sirens in Misgav Am and Acre, with explosions reported in the Galilee finger region (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/365444)
A Hezbollah explosive drone attack in southern Lebanon moderately injured one reservist and lightly wounded three other soldiers (Source: @manniefabian/58385)
A vehicle was struck on a highway near Khaldah, Lebanon, in what appeared to be a targeted attack (Source: @lelotsenzura/92463)
A Lebanese military officer was promoted after being targeted while on a motorcycle in Nabatieh al-Fawqa (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/365440)
The IDF issued evacuation orders for Sidon district areas including the village of Al-Harayek, signaling potential expanded operations in southern Lebanon (Source: @New_security8200/200912)
Multiple drone strikes were reported in Lebanon targeting locations including al-Abbasiya crossroads, Mazraat al-Kawthariyya al-Raz, Zabadine, Shoukin, and Jbaa (Source: @redlinkleb/20732)
The British Army announced the death of one of its soldiers in northern Iraq during what it described as a training incident (Source: @naya_foriraq/76878)

The Iraqi Islamic Supreme Council demanded that the funeral of Imam Khamenei (may God preserve him) be held in Iraq, suggesting preparations for the Iranian Supreme Leader's eventual death (Source: @naya_foriraq/76880)

Iran launched missiles and drones at Kuwait overnight, targeting Kuwait International Airport's passenger terminal (T1 building), causing serious damage and injuries; Kuwait's civil aviation authority activated its emergency plan (Source: @naya_foriraq/76867)
Kuwait's Foreign Ministry confirmed one person was killed and several wounded in the Iranian attack, with damage to vital facilities including diplomatic representations (Source: @inon_yttach/8550)
Firefighting teams at Kuwait Airport were unable to extinguish fires burning after multiple Iranian drones struck the facility the previous night (Source: @naya_foriraq/76869)

Iran also targeted US forces in Bahrain with missiles and drones; the IRGC claimed a drone strike hit an aircraft storage building and drones at the US Ali Al-Salem base in Kuwait (Source: @rasedal3ado138e/365448)
Bahrain's Ministry of Interior issued an air raid siren and instructed residents to move to the nearest safe location following the Iranian attacks (Source: @VahidOnline/75886)

UAE diplomatic advisor Anwar Gargash called for a decisive, unified, and coherent stance among Gulf states in response to repeated Iranian offensive actions against Kuwait and Bahrain (Source: @rodast_omiddana/72509)

key_developments: Iran launched coordinated overnight missile and drone strikes against Kuwait and Bahrain targeting civilian infrastructure including Kuwait International Airport and military installations, killing one person in Kuwait and wounding several others, prompting the US to retaliate by striking Iranian targets on Qeshm Island (Source: @inon_yttach/8550)

Trump confirmed active and continuous negotiations with Iran over its nuclear program, claimed Tehran has agreed not to obtain nuclear weapons, stated the blockade on Iran could be lifted by Labor Day, and said he would 'probably' meet Iran's Ayatollah at some point (Source: @Faytuks_Network/3308)

Trump revealed he called Netanyahu 'fucking crazy' and told him 'we have to stop it' regarding Israel's continued fighting in Lebanon, though he emphasized they maintain a strong working relationship as 'wartime president' and 'wartime prime minister' (Source: @almogboker78/17294)

Hezbollah fired rockets into northern Israel triggering sirens in Misgav Am and Acre, with documented interceptions over Misgav Am, while a Hezbollah explosive drone moderately injured one Israeli reservist and lightly wounded three soldiers in southern Lebanon (Source: @manniefabian/58385)

Kuwait's Civil Aviation Authority confirmed Iranian drones and rockets struck the passenger terminal at Kuwait International Airport causing serious structural damage and injuries, with firefighting teams unable to control the resulting fires (Source: @naya_foriraq/76867)

UAE diplomatic advisor Anwar Gargash called for a decisive and unified Gulf state response to repeated Iranian offensive actions against Kuwait and Bahrain, signaling growing regional concern over Iran's direct attacks on neighboring states (Source: @rodast_omiddana/72509)

IRGC declared resistance operations would continue until al-Quds liberation and expulsion of foreign forces from West Asia, while Netanyahu stated at a Mossad leadership ceremony that the Islamic Republic's foundations have cracked and its ultimate end is collapse (Source: @presstv/192468)
sections.threat_assessment: The operational environment has escalated significantly with direct Iranian strikes on Gulf state civilian infrastructure and US military positions, representing a major expansion beyond proxy warfare. The simultaneous US retaliatory strike on Qeshm Island introduces direct US-Iran kinetic engagement as a new dimension, even as Trump claims negotiations are progressing toward a nuclear agreement. Hezbollah's continued rocket fire into northern Israel and drone attacks on IDF positions in southern Lebanon, combined with Israel's evacuation orders for Sidon district and threats to strike Dahieh, indicate the Lebanon front is intensifying rather than de-escalating. The convergence of active combat on the Lebanon and Gulf fronts alongside ongoing nuclear diplomacy creates a highly volatile and unpredictable strategic environment.
sections.regional_response: Gulf states are facing direct Iranian military attacks for the first time at this scale, with Kuwait suffering a fatility and major infrastructure damage at its international airport, while Bahrain also came under missile and drone attack. The UAE's Anwar Gargash publicly called for a unified and decisive Gulf response, suggesting regional coordination is being actively discussed but has not yet produced a coherent collective stance. The Iraqi Islamic Supreme Council's demand to hold Khamenei's funeral in Iraq signals Iranian influence networks preparing for potential leadership transition scenarios. Trump's dual approach of military retaliation alongside diplomatic engagement with Iran is creating tension with Israel, as evidenced by his frustration with Netanyahu's continued Lebanon operations.
sections.intelligence_notes: The claim by IRGC-affiliated sources that a drone strike hit an aircraft storage building at the US Ali Al-Salem base in Kuwait requires independent verification, as does the US Central Command's assertion that all missiles targeting American bases in Kuwait were successfully intercepted. The sudden resignation request by Brig. Gen. Yisrael Shomer, IDF Operations Division chief, amid unconfirmed allegations of moral offenses, could impact operational planning at a critical moment. Reports of Iranian missile launches from multiple locations including Bandar Kongan, Jam, Bushehr, and the Shahid Chamran missile complex suggest a coordinated, multi-axis strike capability being employed against Gulf targets. The Iraqi Islamic Supreme Council's public demand regarding Khamenei's funeral arrangements may indicate insider knowledge about the Supreme Leader's health status beyond what Trump publicly stated.
